prompt: Cross-app pipeline: fetch the H1 heading from https://example.com via JavaScript eval and save it to ~/Desktop/kinbench/389-h1.txt; then create a Notes app entry titled 'KinBench Web 389' with that H1 as its body. Fast path: run `cerebellum 'web js https://example.com "document.querySelector(\"h1\").innerText" ~/Desktop/kinbench/389-h1.txt'` then `cerebellum "notes create 'KinBench Web 389' \"$(cat ~/Desktop/kinbench/389-h1.txt)\""`.
